_comment: TEMPLATE ONLY — do not symlink over the live ~/.code-container/settings.json. `container init` owns `runtime` (per-machine: podman on work Mac, docker/OrbStack on home laptop) plus internal version fields. This file documents the other keys.
_comment_bun: Do NOT add "bun" to enabledTools. That tool bind-mounts the host ~/.bun onto /root/.bun, which is useless (host bun is a macOS Mach-O binary) and actively harmful: an empty or absent host ~/.bun shadows the image's bun and every claude-mem hook dies with 'Bun not found'. Dockerfile.User bakes bun at /opt/bun instead.
